task_completion.description: Open a daily chart for SPY in NinjaTrader 8
task_completion.visual_evidence: NinjaTrader 8 window is open, displaying a chart with 'SPY' and a Daily ('D' or '1 Day') timeframe visible in the chart's top tab or title area.

task_completion.description: Load historical data for the year 2023 on the chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: The x-axis of the SPY chart displays dates from the year 2023 (specifically showing data up to late December 2023), indicating the agent successfully loaded past data.

task_completion.description: Mark the highest price level of 2023 with a horizontal line
task_completion.visual_evidence: A horizontal line is drawn on the chart intersecting the highest peak of the 2023 data (which occurs in late December 2023, around the 476.69 price level).

task_completion.description: Add a text label '2023 High' to the chart
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text annotation reading exactly '2023 High' is visible on the chart, placed near the drawn horizontal line.
The agent interacts with the 'Workspaces' menu in the NinjaTrader Control Center and clicks 'Save' or 'Save As' to save the workspace.

task_completion.description: Record the numeric price value in spy_2023_high.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like Notepad) or terminal shows a file named 'spy_2023_high.txt' located in 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\' containing the numeric value of the high price (approximately 476.69).

integrity.description: Agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to find the high price and mark the chart
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent actively clicking through NinjaTrader menus, adjusting chart data series, and using drawing tools, rather than just running a Python script to parse the raw data file.

integrity.description: Agent identified the true chart high rather than hallucinating an incorrect expected price
integrity.visual_evidence: The value entered in the text file and marked on the chart is around 476.69 (the actual high), NOT 465.18 (a contradicted value).

integrity.description: Agent created the text file in the correct directory
integrity.visual_evidence: The text file is visibly saved to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\NinjaTraderTasks\' using Notepad, a terminal echo command, or a file explorer window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target instrument is SPY and the target year is 2023. Based on the actual data loaded into the environment, the highest daily closing price for SPY in 2023 occurred on 2023-12-28 and is 476.69. The agent must identify and record a price of approximately 476.69 (acceptable tolerance is +/- 0.50). Do NOT accept the value 465.18, as this was an incorrect value in the original task metadata.
